signature: static void processCertificateElements(struct ndpi_detection_module_struct *ndpi_struct, struct ndpi_flow_struct *flow, u_int16_t p_offset, u_int16_t certificate_len)
params: struct ndpi_detection_module_struct *ndpi_struct - nDPI engine/detection context; holds the current packet being dissected
struct ndpi_flow_struct *flow - per-flow state; destination of parsed certificate fields (server_names, issuerDN, subjectDN, ...)
u_int16_t p_offset - start offset into packet->payload for this certificate block
u_int16_t certificate_len - length of the certificate block to parse
harness_callchain: LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput (fuzz/fuzz_ndpi_reader.c: writes Data to a temp pcap, pcap_open_offline, loops pcap_next_ex) -> ndpi_detection_process_packet -> ndpi_search_tls_wrapper (tls.c:2352) -> ndpi_search_tls_tcp (tls.c:873) -> ndpi_search_tls_tcp_memory / processTLSBlock (tls.c:810, on reassembled handshake) -> processCertificate (tls.c:684) -> processCertificateElements (tls.c:790 call site; 317 definition). NOTE: the original OSS-Fuzz 57317 report used the dedicated harness fuzz/fuzz_tls_certificate.c, which was added AFTER tag 4.2 and is not present at this tag; at 4.2 the same sink is reachable via fuzz/fuzz_ndpi_reader.c feeding a crafted TLS certificate handshake.
